debug_info.goal:
E : Type u_1
inst✝¹¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹⁰ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝⁹ : FiniteDimensional ℝ E
H : Type u_2
inst✝⁸ : TopologicalSpace H
I : ModelWithCorners ℝ E H
M : Type u_3
inst✝⁷ : TopologicalSpace M
inst✝⁶ : ChartedSpace H M
m : IsManifold I (↑⊤) M
hI : I.Boundaryless
E' : Type u_4
inst✝⁵ : NormedAddCommGroup E'
inst✝⁴ : NormedSpace ℝ E'
inst✝³ : FiniteDimensional ℝ E'
H' : Type u_5
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace H'
I' : ModelWithCorners ℝ E' H'
N : Type u_6
inst✝¹ : TopologicalSpace N
inst✝ : ChartedSpace H' N
m' : IsManifold I' (↑⊤) N
f : M → N
s : Set M
hs : IsOpen s
x✝¹ : DiffeologicalSpace M := @IsManifold.toDiffeology E inst✝¹¹ inst✝¹⁰ H inst✝⁸ I M inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶ m
x✝ : DiffeologicalSpace N := @IsManifold.toDiffeology E' inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ H' inst✝² I' N inst✝¹ inst✝ m'
hf : DSmooth (s.restrict f)
x : M
hxs : x ∈ s
⊢ ContMDiffWithinAt I I' (↑⊤) f s x

failed_attempts:
let c := extChartAt I x; let y := c x
  let U := c.target ∩ c.symm ⁻¹' s
  have hU : IsOpen U := c.open_target.inter (c.continuous_invFun.isOpen_preimage _ hs)
  have hy : y ∈ U := ⟨mem_extChartAt_target x, by simp [c, y, hxs]⟩
  rw [contMDiffAt_iff_contMDiffAt_comp_extChartAt (I := I) (I' := I') (f := f) (x := x)]
  let L := ContinuousLinearEquiv.ofFinrankEq (finrank_euclideanSpace_fin (ℝ) (finrank ℝ E)).symm
  let z := L.symm y
  have hz : z ∈ L.symm ⁻¹' U := by simp [z, hy]
  rw [←L.contMDiffAt_comp_iff, ←contMDiffOn_iff_contMDiffAt (L.continuous.isOpen_preimage _ hU) hz]
  change IsPlotOn (m'.toDiffeology) (f ∘ c.symm ∘ L) (L.symm ⁻¹' U)
  let p : Eucl (finrank ℝ E) → s := fun w ↦ if hw : w ∈ L.symm ⁻¹' U then ⟨c.symm (L w), mem_preimage.1 (mem_preimage.1 hw <| inter_subset_right)⟩ else ⟨x, hxs⟩
  have hp : IsPlotOn (m.toDiffeology) p (L.symm ⁻¹' U) := by
    dsimp [IsManifold.toDiffeology]; apply ContMDiffOn.congr (f := fun w ↦ c.symm (L w))
    · exact (contMDiffOn_extChartAt_symm x).comp L.contMDiff.contMDiffOn (mapsTo_preimage _ inter_subset_left)
    · intro w hw; simp [p, hw]
  exact (hf p hp).congr (fun w hw ↦ by simp [p, hw])
